name: In-ground spa install
description: Fully in-ground spa: excavation, drainage, base, plumbing, electrical, crane placement, backfill and handover. Prices are ex GST and are YOUR defaults - edit them in Settings > Price templates.

lineItems.description: Excavation of spa pit and trenches, spoil removal
lineItems.notes: Includes machine hire and tip fees

lineItems.description: Sub-surface drainage and aggregate around shell
Crane hire for spa placement into pit
Water supply and drainage runs, trenched
Plumbing rough-in, connection and pressure test
Electrical cable run from switchboard, trenched
Dedicated circuit, isolator, equipotential bonding, connect and test
lineItems.notes: Licensed electrician, certificate of compliance supplied

lineItems.description: Backfill, compact and rough level around shell
Tight access allowance - manual handling / smaller machine
Fill, commission, water balance and handover walkthrough
